Use this data source to query ECS instances.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_instances" "example" {
  region = "tokyo-a"
  name   = "example-instance"
  limit  = 10
}

output "instance_count" {
  value = data.edgenext_ecs_instances.example.total
}
```

Argument Reference

* `region` - (Required) Region.
* `name` - (Optional) Instance name filter.
* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched instance count.
* `instances` - Instance list. Common fields include `id`, `name`, `status`, `flavor`, `fixed_addresses`, `floating_addresses`, and `created_at`.
